---
title: "Persistent inequalities in PM2.5 Exposure: Santiago (2022-2024)"
subtitle: "Statistical analysis: tables and figures"
date: "2026-01-28"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## 2. Descriptive Statistics

The following tables summarize the availability of valid data and average PM2.5 concentrations per municipality.

### 2.1 Annual Statistics
Overview of the entire study period (2022-2024).

```{r}
#| label: tbl-annual
#| echo: false
#| message: false

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(gt)

table_annual <- read_rds("../output/tables/table_1_anual.rds")

table_annual %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Table 1: Annual descriptive statistics of daily PM2.5 concentrations by municipality in the Metropolitan Region (2022-2024)"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    comuna = "Municipality",
    anio = "Year",
    N_days = "Valid days"
  )
```
